Control is channel and appears clear. Shore vegetation submerged. Photos. Significant amounts of debris flowing. First FlyingFox battery completely drained after one loop test and four transects. Remote began beeping and voltage went to 10. Used second battery to finish measurement. Unsure if batteries are poor or conditions (i.e. signifiant velocities) caused rapid battery drain. Loop test contained consecutive bad BT exceeding 9.0s and percentage bad BT exceeding 5.0 (19.807). Stationary tests located at representative channel locations (approximate thirds). Some ambiguity velocities at edges. Transect 000 is an obvious outlier. It is discarded along with 001 (reciprocal pair). Transect 006 discarded (false start). Due to poor loop test, odd application of stationary MBT corrections (3.12%) and very good GPS data, GGA is used as reference. Sources:Manual,eHSN v1.2.4
